user_query: I'm organizing a party for my company and I need to buy some electronic devices. Get me the details of a product with ID 611247373064 using the Price Comparison tool. Moreover, provide me with the Best Buy product data for the keyword 'electronic devices' using the BestBuy Product Data API tool.

TaskList.description: Fetch product details for the product with ID 611247373064 using the Price Comparison tool.
Fetch Best Buy product data for the keyword 'electronic devices'.
